titleStmt.title: SII 34.319: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 319. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the east wall of the Bṛihadamba shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Moṇṇaiyappaṉ Vīranarasiṅgarāya-nāyakka-viḻupparaiyaṉ of Tiruvārūr remitted in favour of the temple of Tiruvarankuḷanāthar the tax amount of 20 poṉ that was being paid by Sōmakula-vīravarada on the temple land as part of the entire tax of the nāḍu. The remission was made for celebrating the car festival of the temple for the merit of his overlord (svāmi) Vīra-Narasingarāya-Nāyakkar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cakāttam 1000 4 100 3 10 9 mEl ce
llāniṉṟa Īcura varuṣam mācimātam 3
Irācarācavaḷa nāṭṭu valla nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār
tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya tampirāṉār Āticaṇṭē
śvaratEvaṟku cuvāmi vīranaraciṅkarāya nāyakkar tirumE
ṉikku naṉṟāka kamalālaiyappati tiruvārūr moṇṇai
yappaṉ vīranaraciṅkarāya nāyakka viḻupparaiyaṉēṉ
kalveṭṭikkuṭuttapaṭi Irācakarattukku vallanāṭu nāṭṭār
poṟutta poṉṉukku tampirānār Araṅkuḷanātar kōyili
le varuṣam Oṉṟukku cōmakulavīravarata Iṟuttu varum poṉ
2 10 Inta poṉ Irupatum nāṭṭukkaṇakkilum IrEkai
yilum kaḻittu tampirāṉār Araṅkuḷa nātaṟku tirunāḷum tirut
tērum naṭattuñ celavukku poṉ Irupatum kuṭuttu
cantirātittavarai cella caṟuvamāṉiyamāka kallilum cem
pilum veṭṭikkuṭuttēṉ Araṅkuḷanātaṟku vīranara
ciṅkarāya nāyakka viḻupparaiyaṉēṉ Ippaṭikku Im
maṭi vīranaraciṅkarāya nāyakka viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.319 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
